info.title: Resolver.Athena.CliClient
info.description: Dotnet client library for interacting with the Athena API (Resolver Unknown CSAM Detection)

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Athena Simple CLI
-----------------
A simple command-line interface to illustrate the usage of the Athena client library.

Setup:
Create a `.env` file in the project root with the following content:
   OAUTH_CLIENT_ID=your_client_id
   OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET=your_client_secret
   ATHENA_ENDPOINT=your-athena-endpoint.com

You can optionally set these environment variables to override these provided
defaults:
   OAUTH_AUDIENCE=crisp-athena-live
   OAUTH_AUTH_URL=https://crispthinking.auth0.com/oauth/token

commands.name: classify-single
commands.description: Classify a single image using the Athena API.

arguments.name: image-path
arguments.description: Path to the image file to classify

commands.name: classify
commands.description: Classify images using the standard IAsyncEnumerable client

options.name: --repeat
options.description: If set to >0, repeat sending images every N seconds until cancelled [default: 0]

arguments.name: deployment-id
arguments.description: Deployment ID to target for streaming classify. Use 'random' to generate a random ID.

arguments.name: image-path
arguments.description: Path to the image file to classify
